item.title: Eugene Braunwald, Cardiology Pioneer, Dies at 96
item.description: Eugene Braunwald transformed cardiovascular medicine through seven decades of groundbreaking research, clinical trials, and mentorship that saved coun...

item.title: Fecal Microbiota From Younger Self Forestalls Aging in Mice
item.description: Preclinical research suggests altering the gut microbiome could someday hinder some signs of aging in people. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Late-Night Eating Combined With Stress ‘Double-Hit’ on Gut
item.description: The combination of high stress and consumption of about a quarter of the day’s food in late evening takes its toll in what experts call a ‘chrononutri...

item.title: Supporters Vow to Revive Assisted Dying Bill
item.description: The Terminally Ill Adults Bill fell without a Lords vote on Friday after procedural wrangling ended its 18-month journey through Parliament. Press Ass...

item.title: Use of GLP-1s in Type 1 Diabetes Not Linked to Increased DKA
item.description: In single-center study, GLP-1 use in people with type 1 diabetes was associated with lower hospitalization rates. Medscape Medical News
